title: Kobo Heat Wave
lead: Kobo is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.40. This anomaly has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Kobo has led to extremely high temperatures, resulting in a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 14.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 18%, which is relatively low, while the wind speed is moderate at 14.1 km/h. 
 The lack of rainfall and high temperatures will continue to exacerbate the heat wave conditions in Kobo.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
